mapper.sql: id, parent_id, org_code, org_name, org_type, status, sort, ancestor_path, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted, version
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_org WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM sys_org WHERE org_code = #{orgCode} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_org ( parent_id, org_code, org_name, org_type, status, sort, ancestor_path, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted, version ) VALUES ( #{parentId}, #{orgCode}, #{orgName}, #{orgType}, #{status}, #{sort}, #{ancestorPath}, #{createBy}, NOW(), #{updateBy}, NOW(), 0, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_org SET parent_id = #{parentId}, org_name = #{orgName}, org_type = #{orgType}, status = #{status}, sort = #{sort}, ancestor_path = #{ancestorPath}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_org SET deleted = 1, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM sys_org
WHERE deleted = 0 AND id IN
#{id}
WHERE 1 = 2
SELECT id FROM sys_org WHERE deleted = 0 AND (id = #{rootId} OR ancestor_path LIKE CONCAT('%/', #{rootId}, '/%'))
